records.ety: [OE. cheapien, chepen, to trade, buy, sell, AS. cepian; akin to D. koopen to buy, G. kaufen, Icel. kaupa, Goth. kaupōn to trade. Cf. Chap to bargain.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Cheapened (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Cheapening.]

defs: To ask the price of; to bid, bargain, or chaffer for.
quotes: Pretend to cheapen goods, but nothing buy.

defs: To beat down the price of; to lessen the value of; to depreciate.
quotes: My proffered love has cheapened me.
